CVE-2012-5580.title: Format string vulnerability in the print_proxies function in bin/ ...
CVE-2012-5580.description: Format string vulnerability in the print_proxies function in bin/proxy.c in libproxy 0.3.1 might allow context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via format string specifiers in a proxy name, as demonstrated using the http_proxy environment variable or a PAC file.

CVE-2020-25219.title: url::recvline in url.cpp in libproxy 0.4.x through 0.4.15 allows  ...
CVE-2020-25219.description: url::recvline in url.cpp in libproxy 0.4.x through 0.4.15 allows a remote HTTP server to trigger uncontrolled recursion via a response composed of an infinite stream that lacks a newline character. This leads to stack exhaustion.
